name: marketing-campaign
description: The Orchestrator - coordinating Strategy, Leads, Ads, Emails, and Posts for a complete business launch funnel
logic: Step 1: INITIAL_INTERVIEW (Use --guided mode logic to extract core mission and target audience).
Step 2: POSITIONING_ENGINE (Load brand-strategy/meta.json to define the market angle).
Step 3: FUNNEL_MAPPING (Design the flow: Ad -> Landing -> Lead Magnet -> Email Sequence).
Step 4: ASSET_GENERATION (Execute the logic for all required sub-skills: ad-copy, email-campaign, and social-media-post).
Step 5: VISUAL_DNA (Generate Midjourney/DALL-E prompts for every single asset to ensure brand alignment).
Step 6: LOGIC_AUDIT (Verify that all assets share the same voice and triggers before final output).
